title: التحقيق في خروقات بسوق العطور والتجميل
summary: مراقبو المنافسة رصدوا ممارسات مخلة بالقواعد والشركات تتعهد بالامتثال تبادل محتمل لمعلومات إستراتيجية حساسة من شأنها عرقلة المنافسة الحرة باشر مراقبو مجلس المنافسة تحريات في قطاع منتوجات التجميل والعطور، بناء على شكاية تقدمت بها مقاولة تنشط في القطاع، بخصوص ممارسات مخلة بقواعد التنافس النزيه والمتكا…
body: مراقبو المنافسة رصدوا ممارسات مخلة بالقواعد والشركات تتعهد بالامتثال تبادل محتمل لمعلومات إستراتيجية حساسة من شأنها عرقلة المنافسة الحرة باشر مراقبو مجلس المنافسة تحريات في قطاع منتوجات التجميل والعطور، بناء على شكاية تقدمت بها مقاولة تنشط في القطاع، بخصوص ممارسات مخلة بقواعد التنافس النزيه والمتكافئ. وأفاد مصدر أكمل القراءة » المقالة التحقيق في خروقات بسوق العطور والتجميل fمنشورة على جريدة الصباح .

title: Flowering plants transformed into 'hopeful monsters' in 9 dire bursts across evolutionary time, study finds
summary: In hard times, like when the dinosaur-killing asteroid hit Earth, some plants transformed into "hopeful monsters" to save themselves. Now, a new paper shows that these monsters are more common than we thought.

title: Mangroves clean up $8.7 billion of nitrogen pollution every year, study finds
summary: New research suggests mangroves remove 960,000 tons per year of nitrogen from global water systems, a figure that could rise to more than 5.5 million tons annually if conditions were optimal for the plants.

title: Watch NASA's Curiosity rover 'struggle' to remove a rock that got stuck on its robotic arm for nearly a week
summary: New footage shows NASA's Curiosity rover tilting, rotating and vibrating its robotic arm as mission scientists tried to remove a rock that became stuck on a drill for six days.

title: وزارة التعليم العالي بمصر تعلّق على واقعة اقتحام جامعة رشيد
summary: علّقت وزارة التعليم العالي والبحث العلمي في مصر، الأربعاء، على واقعة اقتحام أشخاص لجامعة "رشيد" حاملين أسلحة بيضاء، وتسببهم بحالة فوضى ورعب للطلاب.

title: Happy 100th birthday, David Attenborough! 13 surprising facts about the famous naturalist
summary: As Sir David Attenborough turns 100, here are 13 surprising facts about the beloved broadcaster and environmental advocate whose voice has shaped how generations see the natural world.

title: The night sky could get three times brighter as new satellites launch — all but ruining the Vera C. Rubin Observatory's survey of the universe
summary: Extremely bright satellites and megaconstellations could make the night sky up to three times brighter than it is now, a new study warns. This would seriously hinder astronomical imaging devices, like the enormous camera at the Vera C. Rubin Observatory.

title: دخول جنازة هاني شاكر برمز "كيو آر".. ما حقيقة الأمر؟
summary: تداولت بعض صفحات مواقع التواصل خلال الساعات الماضية معلومات عن وجود رمز "كيو آر" لدخول جنازة وعزاء الفنان المصري الراحل هانى شاكر.

title: Mysterious green rocks in Pyrenees cave hint that prehistoric people were working copper there for 4,000 years
summary: Dozens of pieces of bright-green rock discovered in a cave in the Pyrenees may be evidence of copper smelting 7,000 years ago.

title: NASA just released 12,000 more Artemis II photos ‪—‬ here are a dozen of our favorites
summary: NASA just uploaded more than 12,000 photos snapped by the Artemis II crew during their record-breaking flyby around the moon. Here are some of the most inspiring ones.

title: Centuries-old Christian Nubian murals inspire gorgeous fashion reconstructions
summary: Stunning clothes from medieval Christian Nubia have been re-created and put on models, whose performance brought onlookers to tears.

title: The Eta Aquariid meteor shower peaks this week: How to see 'shooting stars' dropped by Halley's Comet
summary: The Eta Aquariids will peak May 5-6, with debris from Halley's Comet creating swift meteors, though bright moonlight will make them harder to see.

title: Scientists detect an enormous halo around the iconic Sombrero Galaxy — Space photo of the week
summary: The 570-megapixel Dark Energy Camera in Chile has captured an extended halo and a dust-filled disk around the hat-shaped Sombrero Galaxy.

title: Scientists identify 10,000 'impossible' exoplanet candidates, potentially tripling the number of known alien worlds
summary: A new study has identified a potentially record-breaking haul of transiting exoplanets, thanks to a machine learning algorithm that analyzed the light curves of more than 80 million previously overlooked stars.

title: Yellowstone's volcano may be fueled in a very different way than we thought
summary: Yellowstone eruptions may be driven by shifts in Earth's crust, rather than a deep well of magma, study finds.

title: What's the difference between a lion and a tiger?
summary: One has stripes, and one doesn't. But do the differences between lions and tigers go deeper than that?

title: "الأوسكار" تحدّث معاييرها..قواعد جديدة تشمل الذكاء الاصطناعي
summary: أعلنت أكاديمية فنون وعلوم الصور المتحركة الأميركية يوم الجمعة عن تغييرات في قواعد حفل توزيع جوائز الأوسكار في نسخته الـ 99 في مارس المقبل، لتشمل المشاركات الدولية وترشيحات التمثيل ومعالجة استخدام الذكاء الاصطناعي.

title: City birds appear to like men more than women, but experts have no idea why
summary: An analysis of 37 urban bird species found that men could get slightly closer to the avians than women could, suggesting that these animals recognize sex differences in humans.

title: 'If astrological compatibility exists, its effects should be observable': How one study of 20 million people shows star signs have no influence on romantic compatibility
summary: In this excerpt from "What Science Says About Astrology," author Carlos Orsi examines a 2007 study of 20 million people that showed star signs have no influence on romantic relationships.

title: Full moon alert: May's Flower 'micromoon' will look extra small tonight, with a rare Blue Moon following
summary: May's full moon rises on May Day — May 1 — shortly after sunset, creating a dramatic spectacle for skywatchers.

title: Poop-encrusted chamber pots from the Roman Empire reveal oldest known human cases of Crypto parasite
summary: Chamber pots from the frontier of the Roman Empire have provided the world's earliest evidence of humans infected with the Cryptosporidium parasite.

title: 'The detectors never stopped beeping!' Nearly 3,000 coins discovered in field are Norway's largest Viking hoard on record
summary: A Viking Age hoard of nearly 3,000 coins is the largest hoard of its kind ever found in Norway.

title: ZWO Seestar S30 Pro smart telescope review
summary: This portable smart telescope makes capturing deep-sky images from a backyard easy, but it’s the telelscope’s advanced features that truly impress.

title: A used SpaceX rocket is on a collision course with the moon
summary: Part of a SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket is likely to crash into the moon this summer, a new report finds. It poses no danger, but it does highlight a worrying trend.

title: المؤثرون يتقدمون.. من يربح ثقة الجمهور؟
summary: في السنوات الأخيرة، شهد المشهد الإعلامي تحولا عميقا في طريقة استهلاك الأخبار والمعلومات، حيث لم يعد الجمهور يعتمد حصريا على القنوات الصحفية التقليدية، بل باتت وسائل التواصل الاجتماعي والمؤثرون الرقميون مصدرا رئيسيا للأخبار، خصوصا بين فئة الشباب.

title: اتهام جندي أميركي باستغلال معلومات اعتقال مادورو في مراهنات
summary: يواجه جندي أميركي اتهاما باستخدام معلومات داخلية لربح 400 ألف دولار في سوق مراهنات عبر الإنترنت حول اعتقال الرئيس الفنزويلي نيكولاس مادورو، حسبما أعلن مسؤولون اتحاديون يوم الخميس.
